name: Hugging Face
title: Hugging Face AI Engineering
subtitle: The open-source AI platform — models, datasets, deployment.
summary: Hugging Face is the GitHub of AI — hosts 1M+ open-source models + datasets + community Spaces. This course covers HF's full stack: Transformers library for using + fine-tuning models, Datasets library, Hub for sharing, Spaces for deployment, and production patterns. Practical workflows from running a model in 5 lines to fine-tuning + deploying a custom model.

modules.title: Hugging Face Hub and the ecosystem
modules.objective: Navigate the platform; find + use models + datasets.

lessons.title: Finding the right model for your task

modules.title: Transformers library essentials
modules.objective: Use any open-source model in code.

lessons.title: Tokenizers, Models, and the lower-level API
Running locally vs. via Inference API

modules.title: Fine-tuning models
modules.objective: Adapt models to your specific data + task.

lessons.title: PEFT and LoRA for efficient training

modules.title: Spaces and deployment
modules.objective: Ship your AI as a web app.

modules.title: Production AI patterns
modules.objective: Build real-world AI systems with HF.
